title: Binary Search Tree Playground
description: An interactive, high-fidelity playground to visualize and master Binary Search Trees (BST). Animate node insertion, deletion, lookups, height-balanced checks, left/right rotations, Lowest Common Ancestor (LCA) traces, and various traversals (Preorder, Inorder, Postorder, Breadth-First) with synchronized pseudocode tracking and structured step-by-step logs.
